changes_from_iter_1: dim_filter: part scan parallelized with 32 OpenMP threads + atomic bitset OR
build_joins: partsupp scan parallelized with 32 OpenMP threads + per-thread vectors
orders lookup: replaced 268MB pre-built hash index with 60MB flat uint8_t year_arr
psmap.init(): replaced initialization loop with memset (SIMD-accelerated)

data_structures.supplier_lookup: flat_array[100001] int8_t indexed by s_suppkey; 100KB, L1/L2 resident
data_structures.part_filter: bitset(2000001 bits = 245KB) indexed by p_partkey; L2 resident; built with atomic OR in 32-thread OpenMP loop
data_structures.partsupp_join: compact_hash_map open-addressing CAP=1<<20 uint64->double; 16MB; built from per-thread collected entries
data_structures.orders_join: FLAT uint8_t year_arr[60000001]; 60MB; year_arr[o_orderkey]=year-1992; 4.5x denser than 268MB hash index; direct array access, no probe needed
data_structures.aggregation: flat_array double[25][8] thread_local; 1600 bytes per thread; fully L1 resident

parallelism.dim_filter_part_scan: OpenMP 32 threads; 2M rows / 32 = 62.5K per thread; atomic OR for bitset updates
parallelism.build_joins_partsupp_scan: OpenMP 32 threads; 8M rows / 32 = 250K per thread; per-thread AlignedPSVec(cache-line aligned) collects qualifying entries; sequential insert ~384K entries into psmap
parallelism.build_joins_year_arr: OpenMP 32 threads; 15M orders / 32; each o_orderkey is unique (no write race)
parallelism.lineitem_scan: 32 pthreads; morsel-driven chunking; thread-local double[25][8] aggregation

orders_lookup_analysis.iter_1_approach: mmap pre-built orders_orderkey_hash.bin; 33.5M slots x 8 bytes = 268MB; hash+probe per lookup
orders_lookup_analysis.iter_2_approach: flat uint8_t year_arr[60000001]; 60MB; direct array access year_arr[ok]
orders_lookup_analysis.expected_cache_miss_reduction: significant; 2.88M qualifying lookups benefit from much denser packing

estimated_phase_times.dim_filter: ~8ms (50ms/32 threads + atomic overhead; 112MB scanned at full bandwidth)
estimated_phase_times.build_joins: ~12ms (partsupp: 8ms parallel scan + 4ms sequential insert; year_arr: 3ms parallel build)
estimated_phase_times.main_scan: ~50ms (unchanged worker count; reduced orders cache miss penalty from denser year_arr)
